login.title: Sign in — Plex Wrapped
login.desktop_subtitle: Plex Wrapped is only available on your phone. Open this page on a mobile device to discover your year in streaming.
login.heading: Your year in streaming
login.subtitle: Discover your personal Wrapped — from watch time to top movies and your crown.
login.footnote: Secure sign-in via Plex. We never store your password.

auth.plex_login_failed: Plex login failed. Check server logs and try again.
auth.login_not_completed: Login not completed. Please try again.
auth.profile_load_failed: Could not load your Plex profile. Try again.
auth.server_unavailable: Server stats unavailable. Try again later.
auth.test_profile_missing: No test profile for this Plex account. Run: python scripts/load_test_wrapped.py --user-id {plex_id} (or add yourself to data/fixtures/test_users.json).
auth.account_not_linked: Your Plex account is not linked to this server. Contact the admin.

api.wrapped_not_ready: Plex Wrapped is not available yet. Please try again later.
api.wrapped_not_generated: Wrapped has not been generated yet. Ask the admin to run compute_wrapped.py.

Your {year}
Plex Wrapped
welcome.subtitle: Let's look back at your year in movies and TV.
welcome.no_activity_subtitle: Start watching to see stats next year.

total_plays.subtitle: times you hit play
total_plays.tagline_500: More than a thousand plays — you keep the server warm.

total_plays.tagline_100: You definitely know where the play button is.
total_plays.tagline_50: A loyal viewer with a healthy dose of play.
total_plays.tagline_none: Ready for a new viewing year.

movies_vs_tv.film_only: Pure movie mode: no shows, just films.
movies_vs_tv.show_only: Pure show mode: no movies, just episodes.
movies_vs_tv.film_almost: Pure movie mode: (almost) no shows, just films.
movies_vs_tv.show_almost: Pure show mode: (almost) no movies, just episodes.
movies_vs_tv.film_ratio: Movies took center stage — {ratio} movies for every episode.
movies_vs_tv.show_ratio: You're a true series binge watcher. For every movie you watched {ratio} episodes.
movies_vs_tv.balanced: A balanced mix of movies and shows.

series_depth.tagline_500: {episodes} episodes?! You barely stopped watching this year.
series_depth.tagline_200: {episodes} episodes across {series} shows — you don't know when to quit.
series_depth.tagline_series: {series} shows started; you're not afraid of a new story.
series_depth.tagline_default: {episodes} episodes in — every show got your full attention.
series_depth.tagline_fallback: You went deep on shows this year.

caption.same: Everyone on the server watched {server_title} — you included. Great minds think alike.
caption.first_played: While the server was all over {server_title}, you started the year with {user_title}.
caption.different: While the server watched {server_title}, {user_title} was your number one.

ai.system: You write short, catchy 'wrapped' punchlines in the style of Spotify Wrapped: informal, playful, and personal (use 'you'). Each punchline is exactly one sentence, at most ~160 characters, without quotation marks and without emoji.
ai.relation_same: The viewer and the rest of the server had the same number one.
ai.relation_first_played: The viewer started the year with this, while the server was on something else.
ai.relation_different: The viewer's taste differed from what the server watched most.
ai.prompt_intro: Generate punchlines for a Plex Wrapped based on this data.
ai.prompt_series_depth_task: 1. 'series_depth': a punchline about how deep the viewer went into shows, based on the number of shows/seasons/episodes.
ai.prompt_server_vs_task: 2. 'server_vs_you': a witty punchline comparing the server's taste ('{server}') with the viewer's ('{user}'). Base the joke on what these titles are about — their themes, tone, setting, or genre — and play with the contrast or overlap. Do NOT append labels like '(show)' or '(movie)' to the titles and do not list bare numbers.
ai.prompt_output:
Reply ONLY with a valid JSON object with exactly these two keys, without markdown, without a code block, and without explanation:
{{"series_depth": "...", "server_vs_you": "..."}}
